title: Gamebirds: decision to not issue the GL45 gamebird general licence for 2025
body: "The Department for Environment, Food & Rural Affairs (Defra) have decided to not issue General licence GL45 for release of gamebirds on or within 500 metres of a SPA in 2025.  Ministers considered that on the basis of all available evidence and advice, it is currently not possible to rule out the risk of highly pathogenic avian influenza (HPAI) spreading to the bird features present on special protection areas (SPAs). To release gamebirds on or within 500 metres of a SPA, you will need an individual licence.  These documents explain how ministers considered the evidence and came to the decision to not issue GL45 for 2025.  "
